video_function: Main recurring world. It must immediately communicate Berlin housing chaos, community, scam potential and absurd house mythology.
establishing_prompt: Wide vertical 9:16 establishing frame of Haus Nebenwirkung, chaotic Berlin Altbau facade, graffiti, stickers, broken mailboxes, crooked entrance, Späti neon glow from below, trash cans with Görli cats nearby, dirty bright colors, thick black outlines, Free-for-All Berlin Absurd Cartoon, readable comic-video composition, clean frame without speech bubbles or readable text.
detail_prompt: Medium vertical 9:16 detail shot inside Haus Nebenwirkung stairwell, broken lamps, layered stickers, political posters as abstract shapes, old doors, Pfand bottles, cables, trash bags, cat paw marks, dirty neon bounce light, thick black outlines, absurd Berlin cartoon, clean frame without speech bubbles.
negative_prompt: photorealism, realistic crime drama, clean luxury building, readable text, real logos, speech bubbles, anime, 3D, glossy look, watermark
continuity_rules: At least one recurring prop in every shot
No real readable slogans or brands

video_function: Reality-check hub. Sami delivers dry Berlin truth here and the cats treat the outside area like territory.
establishing_prompt: Vertical 9:16 cartoon establishing frame of a Berlin Späti under a chaotic Altbau, warm yellow neon, overfilled shelves, Pfand crates, cheap coffee machine, Sami behind counter, cats near entrance, Free-for-All Berlin Absurd Cartoon, thick outlines, dirty bright Späti colors, clean frame without speech bubbles or readable text.
detail_prompt: Close vertical detail shot of Späti counter, cheap coffee cup, Pfandbons as abstract shapes, energy drinks, snack wrappers, cat paw on cardboard box, Sami's deadpan eyes in background, thick black outlines, dirty bright colors, no readable labels, no speech bubbles.
negative_prompt: real brand logos, readable product labels, photorealism, clean supermarket, anime, 3D, speech bubbles, watermark
continuity_rules: Pfand and coffee are recurring props

video_function: Club-world conflict machine. It turns Rico's DJ dream into gatekeeping, weird art mythology and social confusion.
establishing_prompt: Vertical 9:16 establishing frame of Club Nein entrance, dark concrete Berlin club door, long abstract queue silhouettes, red light, fog, stickers as unreadable shapes, Sven Null standing like a wall with clipboard and earpiece, no real club logos, Free-for-All Berlin Absurd Cartoon, thick black outlines, dirty neon colors, clean frame without speech bubbles.
detail_prompt: Medium vertical detail frame inside Club Nein, fog machine, black speakers, red light, cables, strange DJ booth, DJ Nebel as tall skinny silhouette with tiny sunglasses and one silver glove, crowd simplified as dark shapes, thick black outlines, no readable signs, no speech bubbles.
negative_prompt: real club logo, readable club name, photorealism, rave glamour, glossy luxury, police, real brand text, speech bubbles, anime, 3D, watermark
continuity_rules: Club is called Club Nein only in data, not as readable image text
Door area always feels like judgment
DJ Nebel always has fog/tiny sunglasses/silver glove
reusable_shots: Rico too clean in club line

video_function: Rico's DJ dream zone and warning zone. DJ Krätze makes the past feel mythic and pathetic at once.
establishing_prompt: Vertical 9:16 cartoon establishing frame of Haus Nebenwirkung basement, old DJ booth, broken speakers, tangled cables, old flyers as unreadable shapes, moldy walls, green and pink club light, DJ Krätze silhouette, Free-for-All Berlin Absurd Cartoon, thick black outlines, clean frame without speech bubbles.

negative_prompt: horror realism, photorealism, readable text, clean studio, modern luxury booth, anime, 3D, speech bubbles, watermark
continuity_rules: DJ dream and decay must both be visible

video_function: Future cat-clan myth zone. The Görli-Clan parodies underworld mythology through cat logic, Pfand and food territory.
establishing_prompt: Vertical 9:16 cartoon establishing frame of Görli-inspired Berlin park, benches, bushes, trash cans, Pfand bottles, simplified tourists, Kralle on trash can throne, Möpse in box, Flitz on fence, absurd tiny cat clan energy, Free-for-All Berlin Absurd Cartoon, thick black outlines, dirty bright park colors, no speech bubbles, no readable text.
